mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERS (EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT) VALUES (#{email} , #{name} , #{password} , #{salt} , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , 0)
mapper.select: SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD , SALT , REGIST_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , LATEST_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , LOGIN_DATE , LATEST_LOGIN_IP , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE , BLOCK_YN FROM MEMBERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT EMAIL , NAME , PASSWORD FROM MEMBERS
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBERS SET LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT = LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT + 1 , LATEST_LOGIN_FAIL_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE EMAIL= #{_parameter}
UPDATE MEMBERS SET BLOCK_YN = 'Y' WHERE EMAIL=#{_parameter} AND LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT >= 5
